step_rationale: NADPH oxidase mediates oxidative stress and ROS generation in ischemia-reperfusion injury.
mechanism: NOX4-driven NADPH oxidase activity amplifies oxidative stress and myocardial injury during ischemia-reperfusion.

references.title: Cardiac ischaemia/reperfusion in pigs and mice increases cardiomyocyte Krüppel-like factor 5 that aggravates tissue injury and remodelling.
